headline: BRMSTE MULTI-CLOUD DOMAIN POLISH REPORT
method: credential-free · DNS + public HTTPS · no tokens · no signing

items.detail: Missing required header(s): Content-Security-Policy. Add at the Caddy domains-platform layer (see domains/POLISH.md).
HSTS is 'max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload' — below target max-age=63072000 (2yr, preload). Raise to max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload.
